---
title: About
---

I am an AI+ Academic Senior Fellow at **King’s College London**, working on the use of **artificial intelligence for disaster forecasting, modelling, and response**.

My research focuses on **interacting natural hazards**, with an emphasis on **AI-enabled forecasting**, **early warning systems**, and **decision support for disaster risk reduction**. I develop machine learning approaches combined with system-level modelling to better understand cascading impacts, uncertainty, and operational constraints in real-world settings.

My work sits at the interface of **artificial intelligence, Earth systems, and disaster risk**, spanning the **King’s Institute for Artificial Intelligence** and the **Department of Geography**.

### Research themes
- AI-enabled multi-hazard forecasting and early warning  
- Modelling of cascading and compound disasters  
- Uncertainty-aware prediction and evaluation  
- Decision support for disaster response and adaptation  

### Contact
- Email: **lorenzo.nava@kcl.ac.uk**  
- Location: King’s College London
